title: German-Style Chicken Hash
description: A hearty German-inspired dish made with crispy chicken, hash browns, and a robust blend of herbs.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside to rest.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet and sauté the hash browns until crispy.
Sprinkle the robust coffee rub over the hash browns and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and top with shredded cheddar cheese.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
